description: Self-healing Linux system transparency suite with TUI, SQLite logging, and Vite+d3.js dashboard

boot_health.purpose: Capture boot metrics, compare against baseline, flag regressions
boot_health.citation: systemd.unit(5) man page — After=multi-user.target ensures filesystems are mounted before collection 【Tier 2†man7.org】

contention_alert.purpose: Alert on CPU>90%, RAM>80%, IOWait>50%, zombie processes
contention_alert.citation: Zhang et al. 2026, 'Recursive Language Models', MIT CSAIL — treat system state as external environment to observe 【Tier 1†arXiv:2512.24601v2】

shutdown_capture.purpose: Log running processes, mount states, open files before halt
shutdown_capture.citation: systemd.service(5) — Conflicts=shutdown.target ensures execution before system halt 【Tier 2†man7.org】

service_manifest.purpose: Document every masked/enabled service with rationale
service_manifest.citation: systemctl(1) — list-unit-files provides canonical service state enumeration 【Tier 2†man7.org】

database.citation: SQLite Documentation — 'SQLite is a C-language library that implements a small, fast, self-contained, high-reliability, full-featured, SQL database engine' 【Tier 2†sqlite.org】

tui.citation: dialog(1) man page — 'Dialog is a program that will let you to present a variety of questions or display messages using dialog boxes' 【Tier 2†man7.org】

api.citation: Flask Documentation — 'Flask is a lightweight WSGI web application framework' 【Tier 2†palletsprojects.com】

dashboard.citation: Bostock et al., 'D3: Data-Driven Documents', IEEE Trans. Visualization & Comp. Graphics, 2011 — 'D3 enables direct inspection and manipulation of the native representation: the document object model' 【Tier 1†d3js.org】

self_healing_principles.idempotent_schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS — safe to re-run
self_healing_principles.graceful_degradation: All collectors check for dependencies; skip with warning if missing
self_healing_principles.log_rotation: Database cleaned via retention policy (90 days default)
self_healing_principles.baseline_comparison: Boot health script flags regressions >2σ from stored baseline
self_healing_principles.auto_recovery: systemd Restart=on-failure with 5s delay on all timers
